basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting 01 Research Associate I position with Ph.D./M.Tech qualification. Last date: 10 July 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Electronics/Electrical/Mechanical/Biomedical Engineering or equivalent OR 3 years research/teaching/design experience after ME/M.Tech with at least one SCI journal paper. Minimum 60% marks at Bachelor’s level. Valid national level test score (GATE/NET etc.) preferred.
qualification.experience: Experience with wearable devices, signal processing, Python, MATLAB, and microcontroller programming.

selection_process: Applications will be scrutinized. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Final selection based on qualifications
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only; no other mode of application will be accepted. Interested and eligible candidates must submit their application through the official online portal of IIT Gandhinagar before the deadline.
Step-by-Step Application Process:
Visit the official application portal: http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/
Register / Login using valid credentials (new users need to create an account).
Fill in the online application form carefully with accurate personal, educational, and professional details.

Upload the required scanned documents, including: Updated Curriculum Vitae (CV) / Resume All academic certificates and mark sheets (from 10th standard onwards) Proof of valid GATE/NET or other national level test scores (if applicable) Experience certificates (highlighting work in wearable devices, signal processing, Python/MATLAB, microcontroller programming, etc.) List of publications (if any) Any other relevant documents supporting your candidature
Updated Curriculum Vitae (CV) / Resume
All academic certificates and mark sheets (from 10th standard onwards)
Proof of valid GATE/NET or other national level test scores (if applicable)
Experience certificates (highlighting work in wearable devices, signal processing, Python/MATLAB, microcontroller programming, etc.)
List of publications (if any)
Any other relevant documents supporting your candidature
Review the filled application form thoroughly before final submission.
Submit the application and take a printout/screenshot of the confirmation page for future reference.
Important Points to Remember:
The last date for online application submission is 10th July 2026.
Applications received after the deadline or incomplete applications will not be considered.
Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date to avoid last-minute technical issues.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the interview.
For any technical queries or clarification regarding the position, candidates may contact Prof. Uttama Lahiri at [email protected].
Note: Only online applications submitted through the official recruitment portal will be accepted. No hard copy or email applications will be entertained.
important_instructions: This is a temporary contractual position for 10 months. HRA @ 30% applicable if not availing Institute accommodation. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. IIT Gandhinagar reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate I - Vacancy Details
IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Ph.D. in Electronics/Electrical/Mechanical/Biomedical Engineering or equivalent OR 3 years research/teaching/design experience after ME/M.Tech with at least one SCI journal paper. Minimum 60% marks at Bachelor’s level. Valid national level test score (GATE/NET etc.) preferred.
Work experience in the development of healthcare devices.
Experience with wearable devices, signal processing, Python, MATLAB, and microcontroller programming.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 Job Description
content_sections.text: The Research Associate will work on the development of a wearable gait monitoring system, including hardware and firmware development for wearable devices, signal acquisition and processing, algorithm development in Python/MATLAB, integration with microcontroller-based platforms, and validation of the system in laboratory and field conditions.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Applications will be scrutinized. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Final selection based on qualifications, experience, and performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate I Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates shall apply online only ; no other mode of application will be accepted. Interested and eligible candidates must submit their application through the official online portal of IIT Gandhinagar before the deadline. Step-by-Step Application Process: Visit the official application portal: http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/ Register / Login using valid credentials (new users need to create an account). Fill in the online application form carefully with accurate personal, educational, and professional details. Upload the required scanned documents, including: Updated Curriculum Vitae (CV) / Resume All academic certificates and mark sheets (from 10th standard onwards) Proof of valid GATE/NET or other national level test scores (if applicable) Experience certificates (highlighting work in wearable devices, signal processing, Python/MATLAB, microcontroller programming, etc.) List of publications (if any) Any other relevant documents supporting your candidature Review the filled application form thoroughly before final submission. Submit the application and take a printout/screenshot of the confirmation page for future reference. Important Points to Remember: The last date for online application submission is 10th July 2026 . Applications received after the deadline or incomplete applications will not be considered. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date to avoid last-minute technical issues. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the interview. For any technical queries or clarification regarding the position, candidates may contact Prof. Uttama Lahiri at [email protected] . Note: Only online applications submitted through the official recruitment portal will be accepted. No hard copy or email applications will be entertained.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: This is a temporary contractual position for 10 months. HRA @ 30% applicable if not availing Institute accommodation. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. IIT Gandhinagar reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate I 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 10th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Research Associate I at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Consolidated pay is Rs. 58,000 per month + HRA @ 30% (if not availing Institute accommodation).

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for IIT Gandhinagar WeGaMo Research Associate position?
faq.answer: Ph.D. in relevant engineering discipline or 3 years post M.Tech experience with SCI journal paper and minimum 60% in Bachelor’s.

faq.question: Q4. How to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate I vacancy?
faq.answer: Submit application online at http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/ by 10 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What skills are required for IIT Gandhinagar Wearable Gait Monitor project?
faq.answer: Experience with wearable devices, signal processing, Python, MATLAB, and microcontroller programming.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the Research Associate position at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: The appointment duration is 10 months.

faq.question: Q7. Is GATE/NET score mandatory for IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate?
faq.answer: Scholars selected through national tests like GATE, NET etc. are eligible/preferred.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project title for IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: WeGaMo: Wearable Gait Monitor.

faq.question: Q9. Who is the Principal Investigator for IIT Gandhinagar WeGaMo project?
faq.answer: Prof. Uttama Lahiri, Department of Electrical Engineering.

faq.question: Q10. Is prior healthcare device experience required for IIT Gandhinagar RA position?
faq.answer: Work experience in development of healthcare devices is desirable.
